author: CasaOS Team
description: Nginx Proxy Manager is a simple, powerful tool to help you host multiple websites on a single server.
tagline: Managing Nginx proxy hosts with a simple, powerful interface.

tips.before_install:
⚠️ Warning!
This is a technical app, please make sure you know what you are doing.
Nginx Proxy Manager occupies ports 80 and 443 by default for built-in Nginx use. It occupies port 81 for the admin page.
Please change the CasaOS WebUI port to a port other than 80/81/443. And pay attention to whether the ports conflict with other apps. Otherwise, it may cause your CasaOS to run abnormally.

Default Administrator User

| Username | Password |
| -------- | -------- |
| `admin@example.com` | `changeme` |

release_notes:
- v2.13.5 adds Vietnamese and Italian locales, with Dutch added and Polish, Russian, Slovak, and Chinese translations updated.
- Fixes include web crashes when viewing Custom Certificates and translation text spacing issues.
- Upgrade notifications, mobile UI/UX improvements, certbot-azure-dns updates, and refreshed OpenResty, Certbot, and s6-overlay components are included.
title: Nginx Proxy Manager
